item.title:
AtTheRaces: At The Races @AtTheRaces · 11min "If she’s trained on and relaxes early, she looks a huge player"
@MCYeeehaaa preview
item.description:
At The Races @AtTheRaces · 11min "If she’s trained on and relaxes early, she looks a huge player"
@MCYeeehaaa previews a fascinating opener at @NewburyRacing tomorrow De attheraces.com 2 2 822

item.title: RacingPost: Racing Post @RacingPost · 11min Epsom or Chantilly? Juddmonte filly cut to 8-1 for Oaks after routing Group 3 rivals und
item.description: Racing Post @RacingPost · 11min Epsom or Chantilly? Juddmonte filly cut to 8-1 for Oaks after routing Group 3 rivals under Colin Keane De racingpost.com 800
